title: Beautiful But Dumb
writer: Fanny Hatton, Frederic Hatton, Jack Natteford
actors: Patsy Ruth Miller, Charles Byer, George E. Stone
plot: Janet Brady, a stenographer, wants the love of her boss. She learns her personality has no appeal, so she drops her mannish clothes and blossoms forth as a simpering flapper. She develops sex appeal plus and though her boss is non...
